topic: AI voice agents - calling your AI from AirPods
notes: Personal experience: went on a walk, stayed in flow, talked to AI assistant via AirPods. It organized ideas, remembered tasks, checked weather — all hands-free while exercising.
hook_angle: The real power of AI isn't replacing work — it's augmenting momentum. Exercise + productivity integrated.
tone: professional with dry humor, anti-hype, practical
